# ALERT

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various Alerts generated by Alert components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| AlertClassID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | ALERT_CLASS | ID of the Alert's class. It is used to route the Alert and define its escalation process. |
| AlertStatusID | SMALLINT(5,0) | False |  | False | ALERT_STATUS | ID that denotes the Alert's status. Linked to the ALERT_STATUS table. |
| AlertTypeID | SMALLINT(5,0) | False |  | False | ALERT_TYPE | ID that denotes the Alert's type. Linked to the ALERT_TYPE table. |
| CreateDFCRevisionFUID | NVARCHAR(36) | True |  | False |  | The FUID of the DFC that created the Alert. Reference to the FUID column in the DFC_REVISION table. |
| CurrentEscalationLevel | INT(10,0) | False |  | False |  | For future use. |
| Duration | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Duration of time from the GenertedOn date/time that the Alert is valid. Alerts with expired durations are not displayed to the user. |
| EscalationDFCRevisionFUID | NVARCHAR(36) | True |  | False |  | For future use. |
| ExpirationDate | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Expiration date of the Alert. Alerts with expired dates are not displayed to the user. |
| GeneratedOn | DATETIME | False |  | False |  | Date and time that the Alert was created on. |
| ID | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. |
| Message | NVARCHAR(2000) | True |  | False |  | Text description of the Alert. |
| MessageID | NVARCHAR(255) | True |  | False |  | For future use. |
| ParentAlertID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | ALERT | For future use. |
| PriorityID | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | PRIORITY | ID that denotes the Alert's priority. Linked to the PRIORITY table. |
| RequiredResponses | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Number of responses required by the Alert. |
| ResponseCount | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Current number of responses against the Alert. |
| ResponseDFCRevisionFUID | NVARCHAR(36) | True |  | False |  | The DFC to be invoked as the response to the Alert. Reference to the FUID column in the DFC_REVISION table. |

## Primary Key

- **PK_ALERT** on `ID`

## Foreign Keys (this table -> other)

- **FK_ALERT_ALERT** — ALERT -> ALERT (`ParentAlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_ALERT_CLASS** — ALERT -> ALERT_CLASS (`AlertClassID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_ALERT_STATUS** — ALERT -> ALERT_STATUS (`AlertStatusID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_ALERT_TYPE** — ALERT -> ALERT_TYPE (`AlertTypeID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_PRIORITY** — ALERT -> PRIORITY (`PriorityID -> ID`)

## Referenced By (other tables -> this)

- **FK_ALERT_ALERT** — ALERT -> ALERT (`ParentAlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_DETAIL_ALERT** — ALERT_DETAIL -> ALERT (`AlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_GROUP_ALERT** — ALERT_GROUP -> ALERT (`AlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_RECIPIENT_ALERT** — ALERT_RECIPIENT -> ALERT (`AlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_ALERT_RESPONSE_ALERT** — ALERT_RESPONSE -> ALERT (`AlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_KPI_ALERT_ALERT** — KPI_ALERT -> ALERT (`AlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_SPC_CHART_ALERT_ALERT** — SPC_CHART_ALERT -> ALERT (`AlertID -> ID`)

## Business Keys (this table -> other)

- ALERT -> DFC_REVISION (`CreateDFCRevisionFUID, ResponseDFCRevisionFUID -> FUID`)

## Unique Indexes

- **** on ``

## Non-Unique Indexes

- **IF_ALERT_ALERT** on `ParentAlertID`
- **IF_ALERT_ALERT_CLASS** on `AlertClassID`
- **IF_ALERT_ALERT_STATUS** on `AlertStatusID`
- **IF_ALERT_DFC** on `CreateDFCRevisionFUID`
- **IF_ALERT_DFC1** on `ResponseDFCRevisionFUID`
- **IF_ALERT_DFC2** on `EscalationDFCRevisionFUID`
- **IF_ALERT_PRIORITY** on `PriorityID`
